headline: Agilent Technologies (A) Is Up 18.6% After AI Pact With OpenAI And Raised 2026 Guidance - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In late May and early June 2026, Agilent Technologies reported higher quarterly sales and earnings, raised its full-year 2026 revenue guidance to US$7.39–7.49 billion, and announced multiple new product launches across diagnostics and analytical instrumentation. Agilent also revealed an enterprise-wide artificial intelligence collaboration with OpenAI and Boston Consulting Group, aiming to embed advanced AI into its instruments, software, and customer workflows to enhance product...
